sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70212" key="neoga/lac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεο-γάλαξ</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[γᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ακτος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n70212.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">just beginning to suck,</tr_> Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0627.tlg004.perseus-grc1:1:352" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.352</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
